calendar.matters:
MASTER CALENDAR JURY
Off Calendar Sep-16-2025 Vacated

Notice Of Motion And Motion To Compel Further Discovery Responses, Production Of Documents And Request For Fees, Costs
Off Calendar Dec-23-2024 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
Appearances:
Alex Binsfeld, Esq., The Law Firm for Tenant Rights, Inc., (866)303-7267 for Plaintiff Kimberly Dodd.
Vanessa Himelblau, Esq., Bledsoe Diestel Treppa and Crane LLP, (415)981-5411 for Defendants.

The matter is argued.

After hearing and considering the argument. The court adopts the tentative ruling as follows:

DEFENDANTS' Motion To Compel Further Discovery Responses, Production Of Documents And Request For Fees, Costs.

Defendants' motion to compel further responses is DENIED... [T]he Court awards two-thirds of Plaintiff's requested sanctions in the amount of $7,000. (see filed order for complete ruling)

Proposed order signed and filed.

Judge: Victor M. Hwang; Clerk: K.Valdes; Not reported. (302/VMH)
